Apple tree next to creek, in park. As far as I know, Northglenn does not restrict foraging in public spaces. Access: Public.
Two large apple trees on the sidewalk. Lots of apples. Access: Public.
5 large, 25 years old crab apples with lots of fruit. Access: Added by owner. Falling Fruit season: August-September.
Falling Fruit access: Added by owner.

Huge tree with tons of pears, easy to access, but you really need a fruit picker to reach bc the branches are so high. Good quality fruit! I think this property belongs to the nursing home, so you could just ask them to pick. Access: Private.
Wild plums ripening along Signal Creek in Thornton. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-October.
